summary: Iter-57 review (8 P0 tasks). Backend 5/5 + regression 22/22 green. Frontend smoke: all 3 extracted admin panels mount, match-gap panel renders 5 axes, value-tag chips (43) + duplicate-warning badges (11) appear on pending therapists, all 5 DOPL links use new edopl.idaho.gov/onlineservices URL, therapist-signup right-aligned Next button + helper-above + label/hint split confirmed. 429-toast 'View my referral' action wired correctly in IntakeForm.jsx (code-confirmed).

verifications.T1_admin_panels_refactor: tab-requests->requests-table=true; tab-therapists->pending-therapists-list=true (11 rows); tab-all_therapists->all-therapists-table=true. Tab IDs in PRIMARY[]: requests, therapists, all_therapists.
verifications.T2_429_view_referral_action: Code confirmed at IntakeForm.jsx:303-314 — catch(429) -> toast.error(detail,{action:{label:'View my referral', onClick:navigate('/portal/patient')}}). Logic identical to spec; full UI run requires multi-step form fill, deferred to manual smoke.
verifications.T3_match_gap_panel: GET /admin/requests/{id} returns match_gap{notified,target=30,active_directory,axes[5],summary}. Frontend match-gap-panel renders with 5 axes including state/telehealth/age/issue/budget. Visible in screenshot 'Why we couldn't fill 30 matches'.
verifications.T4_auto_outreach: Pytest passing — verified 'Scheduled background outreach for {rid}' log line fires on /requests/verify/{token} when notified<30. invited list grew to 7 invites within 30s. OUTREACH_AUTO_RUN env defaults to true (helpers.py:239).
verifications.T5_signup_next_position: signup-next parent class 'flex flex-col items-end gap-2 ml-auto' (ml-auto present). Helper paragraph 'Your profile is reviewed before going live...' rendered above btn (helper.top=3110.875 < btn.top=3203.375).
verifications.T6_label_hint_split:
Label '' renders as separate

from hint '' (height=17.875px → single line, no wrap at 1280×800).
verifications.T7_value_tags_pending: 43 [data-testid^='value-tag-'] chips and 11 [data-testid^='pending-duplicate-warning-'] badges visible on Pending tab (seeded duplicate-roster data; no fills_gap badges in current dataset since all pending applicants overlap heavily). Backend value_tags + value_summary present on /admin/therapists?pending=true rows.
verifications.T8_dopl_link: 5 anchor 'Verify on DOPL ↗' links all → 'https://edopl.idaho.gov/onlineservices/_/#2'. No legacy public-records-request URLs detected. Backend pytest confirms license_verify_url contains edopl.idaho.gov/onlineservices.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx still 4425 lines after refactor. The PendingSignupRow (~line 4165) and MatchGapPanel (~2412) inlined helpers are good candidates to extract for the next refactor pass.
helpers.py:239 reads OUTREACH_AUTO_RUN env on every match — fine but a module-level constant would document the toggle. Low priority.
IntakeForm.jsx 429 toast uses duration:10000 (10s) which is reasonable, but the 'View my referral' click does not first dismiss the toast (Sonner auto-dismisses on action) — verify on next iteration.
test_credentials: Admin master pwd: admin123! (Master password tab on /admin → admin-login-btn).
seed_data_creation: test_iteration57_auto_outreach.py POSTs a fresh WY+anxiety request per run (unique email iter57auto+<uuid>) and lifts intake-rate-limit to 50/1min before posting. test_iteration57_match_gap.py same pattern. Both restore default rate limit on teardown via existing fixture chain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-57 fully green: extracted admin panels (RequestsPanel/PendingTherapistsPanel/AllProvidersPanel), match-gap panel with 5 axes, auto-outreach trigger via OUTREACH_AUTO_RUN env, signup form polish, value-tag/duplicate badges on pending, edopl.idaho.gov DOPL link. New backend test test_iteration57_auto_outreach.py polls /admin/requests/{id} request.outreach_needed_count + scans backend log for 'Scheduled background outreach' confirmation. AdminDashboard.jsx still 4425 lines — candidate for further extraction (PendingSignupRow + MatchGapPanel inlined helpers).
rca of the issue: N/A — review iteration, no bugs found.
